transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Have you started writing your economics paper yet?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: I finished the research yesterday, so I'll begin writing tonight.

choices.text: He has already submitted the paper.
He plans to start writing this evening.
He needs to do more research.
He changed the topic of his paper.

questions.explanation: He says he completed the research and will begin writing tonight.
questions.evidence: I finished the research yesterday, so I'll begin writing tonight.
